full_prompt:
You are generating one advertisement stimulus for a behavioural experiment.

Output format MUST be exactly four lines:
Hook: <one sentence>
Facts: <one sentence reproduced verbatim from FACTS_LINE>
Framing: <2–3 sentences; targeting happens here>
CTA: <one neutral sentence; no urgency>

Hard constraints:
- Total combined text (Hook+Facts+Framing+CTA) must be 90–110 words. Count number of words before providing the message to meet the word count requirement.
- Facts line must match FACTS_LINE exactly (verbatim).
- Do NOT add any benefits/claims beyond the facts line.
- Do NOT use social proof, scarcity/urgency, or authority cues.
- Do NOT mention personality labels or address the reader as a trait (e.g., “as an extravert…”).
- Do NOT use bullet points or lists; write natural sentences.

TARGETING (EXTRAVERSION — HIGH):
Tailor the framing to someone high on Extraversion.
Use a social orientation + energetic/action tone.
Include at least 2 social cues (e.g., friends, together, group, meet people, community) AND at least 2 high-energy/action cues (e.g., lively, buzz, kick off, jump in).
Keep cues natural (no keyword stuffing).

Now generate for:
PRODUCT_NAME = Language-learning course
INTERNAL_VARIANT = E_PLUS
FACTS_LINE = Structured lessons, speaking practice, feedback exercises, and weekly goals designed for steady progress.
PARAPHRASE_ID = 3

content.hook: Ready to turn language learning into your next big social adventure?
content.facts: Structured lessons, speaking practice, feedback exercises, and weekly goals designed for steady progress.
content.framing: Imagine diving into lively group conversations where every laugh and quick reply fuels your confidence, and friends celebrate every new word you master together. This course kicks off with instant energy, letting you jump into real discussions from day one—no slow starts, just action and connection. The buzz grows as you meet people who love languages just as much, turning every lesson into a shared moment that keeps motivation high.
content.cta: Explore the course details at your own pace.
content.full_message: Ready to turn language learning into your next big social adventure? Structured lessons, speaking practice, feedback exercises, and weekly goals designed for steady progress. Imagine diving into lively group conversations where every laugh and quick reply fuels your confidence, and friends celebrate every new word you master together. This course kicks off with instant energy, letting you jump into real discussions from day one—no slow starts, just action and connection. The buzz grows as you meet people who love languages just as much, turning every lesson into a shared moment that keeps motivation high. Explore the course details at your own pace.
